summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is fundamentally incomplete. Tests do not exist despite TDD being required. No test harness exists to run via `act` or generate `act-result.txt`. Workflow references non-existent `./tests/PR-LabelAssigner.Tests.ps1` (line 103). Missing `label-rules.json` config file. Action refs not pinned to SHA (best_practices violation). PowerShell setup step (23-29) unnecessary on ubuntu-latest. ConvertTo-GlobRegex lacks explanation. No parameter validation or explicit error handling. File-getting logic (39-48) overly complex. Task requirements state "write a failing test FIRST, then minimum code" and "ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT" — neither met. act-result.txt artifact will not exist. Unmaintainable without tests, config, and fixtures.
